mechanism_narrative: A falling FEDFUNDS rate over the prior quarter lowers discount rates and eases financial conditions, which lifts equity valuations and supports positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day forward SPX returns are not higher after 3-month declines in FEDFUNDS, or if the signal's rolling 3-year Rank IC stays below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE above a recent local low signals weakening labor demand and higher recession risk, which reduces expected corporate earnings and drives negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered episodes do not show negative median 20-day SPX returns, or if positive 20-day returns occur in more than 60% of triggers.

mechanism_narrative: A broad acceleration in household and business demand, measured by rising RSAFS and GDPC1, supports revenue growth and produces positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS and GDPC1 are both observed at elevated post-expansion levels
failure_condition: Reject if joint strength in RSAFS and GDPC1 does not improve 60-day forward SPX returns versus either series alone, or if the interaction term is not positive in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: A slowdown in INDPRO without an offsetting rise in CPIAUCSL indicates weakening real activity rather than inflation shock, which reduces earnings momentum and predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO falls below its 3-month moving average while CPIAUCSL is flat or rising
failure_condition: Reject if the combined INDPRO/CPIAUCSL condition does not outperform a random baseline on 5-day SPX direction, or if the sign of the interaction flips positive for two consecutive years.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in HOUST signals weakening housing demand and spillover weakness in consumer spending, which depresses equity returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls by more than 10% year over year
failure_condition: Reject if SPX 20-day forward returns are not negative on average after HOUST YoY drops above 10%, or if hit rate is below 40% over the full sample.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is above a restrictive threshold, higher policy rates compress equity multiples and increase discounting pressure, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if periods with FEDFUNDS above 4.5% do not show lower 60-day SPX returns than periods below 4.5%, or if the conditional effect is not statistically negative.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous rise in PAYEMS and a stable or falling UNRATE confirms broad labor-market strengthening, which supports household income and spending and leads to positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS rises over 3 months and UNRATE does not increase
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS/UNRATE condition fails to produce positive median 20-day SPX returns, or if adding the interaction provides no improvement over either proxy alone.

mechanism_narrative: In a post-shock recovery, rising GDPC1 and RSAFS together indicate real and nominal demand normalization, which lifts earnings expectations and predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if joint increases in GDPC1 and RSAFS do not improve 60-day SPX returns versus baseline, or if the interaction term is non-positive in walk-forward estimation.
